---
title: "PSTAT 134 Setup"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
# install.packages(c("httr", "jsonlite"))
library(httr)
library(jsonlite)
library(tidyverse)
library(reticulate)
# py_install(c("requests", "json"))
library(reticulate)
use_python("/opt/conda/bin/python", required = TRUE)

```

```{python}
## get token ready
# !pip install requests pandas
import requests
import base64
import pandas as pd

client_id = "95049306de4f42a8af85d41601e4421b"
client_secret = "a1a62c58805c4c9aafeb0b2282d2d9ef"

auth_str = f"{client_id}:{client_secret}"
b64_auth_str = base64.b64encode(auth_str.encode()).decode()

url = "https://accounts.spotify.com/api/token"

headers = {
    "Authorization": f"Basic {b64_auth_str}"
}

data = {
    "grant_type": "client_credentials"
}

response = requests.post(url, headers=headers, data=data)
token = response.json()["access_token"]

print("Token ready ✅")

```

```{python}
## testing
search_url = "https://api.spotify.com/v1/search"

headers = {
    "Authorization": f"Bearer {token}"
}

params = {
    "q": "Taylor Swift",
    "type": "track",
    "limit": 10
}

response = requests.get(search_url, headers=headers, params=params)
data = response.json()

tracks = data["tracks"]["items"]

for t in tracks:
    print(t["name"], "-", t["artists"][0]["name"])
```
```{python}
## get track IDs

track_ids = [t["id"] for t in tracks]
track_ids

```




```{python}
## get audio features 

import requests
import pandas as pd

# 1. Get the tracks from your search
# Assuming you already have your 'headers' and 'token' defined
search_url = "https://api.spotify.com/v1/search"
params = {'q': 'Taylor Swift', 'type': 'track', 'limit': 10}
r = requests.get(search_url, headers=headers, params=params)
tracks = r.json().get('tracks', {}).get('items', [])

rows = []

for track in tracks:
    # Basic info is still available in 2026
    track_info = {
        "song": track.get("name"),
        "artist": track.get("artists")[0].get("name") if track.get("artists") else None,
        "popularity": track.get("popularity"),
        "album": track.get("album", {}).get("name"),
        "id": track.get("id")
    }
    
    # 2. ATTEMPT to get audio features (May fail due to 2026 restrictions)
    feature_url = f"https://api.spotify.com/v1/audio-features/{track['id']}"
    f_res = requests.get(feature_url, headers=headers)
    
    if f_res.status_code == 200:
        features = f_res.json()
        if features:
            track_info.update({
                "danceability": features.get("danceability"),
                "energy": features.get("energy"),
                "tempo": features.get("tempo")
            })
    
    rows.append(track_info)

df = pd.DataFrame(rows)
df.head()
```
